# id: # Control-plane: adding / removing / weakening a claim is a ratified act (claims-registry.sh enforces coverage).

claim (what + where stated): README version badge == VERSION
every selftest-capable check is wired into CI
core-3 governing docs within their line budget
one deny-matrix, no forked copy (every consumer sources guard-core)
all third-party GitHub Actions are SHA-pinned (kit workflows + canonical reference)
a real SECURITY.md coordinated-disclosure policy ships
seven required + "five conditional" gate words == the enumerated gates (§14)
a scheduled drift-watch re-runs the aggregate + claims + links
a declared+attested cost-governance posture is verifiable (budget + platform cap)
GitLab profile tool installs are checksum-verified (no curl-pipe-to-shell)
GitLab adopter guide covers branch-protection + ratification + DORA and the profile references it
sparkwright doctor posture command is wired (dispatcher routes it; --selftest green)
postmortem generator/parser is wired (sparkwright postmortem routes; --selftest green)
tier-advice decision view is wired + honest (dispatcher routes; DORA-not-a-tier-input + asymmetric apply path locked; --selftest green)
named codex/cursor/gemini adapters conform to the boundary contract (harness-adapter.sh green for each)
every shipped GitHub Actions workflow is a valid GHA document (kit workflows + all profile ci.yml)
conformance detectors fire on the kit's own PROJECT-CLAUDE / AI-System-Card template format (no silent-skip)
SLSA provenance jobs are gated on repo visibility (no red main on user-owned private repos)
golden-path harness runs the reference pipeline + image end-to-end (.github/workflows/golden-path.yml)
preflight surfaces the adopter GitHub environment (user-private->provenance-skip, @your-org CODEOWNERS, workflow validity) advisorily without changing its exit code

the adopter-clean obtain mechanism is wired + link-safe (.gitattributes export-ignore set present, no pruned path is a markdown-link target, adopter-export.sh prunes maintainer-only + unused profiles)
the S1 process-weight mode is enforcement-blind — no conformance check / CI gate reads it, so a mode can never weaken an applicable control
the learner-facing why-layer is wired + drift-locked (sparkwright explain routes; no orphan rationale; every S1-checklist enforcer is taught)
the feature-flag kill-switch reference is wired end-to-end (flags registry + flagged endpoint + flag-aware smoke + golden-path two-boot flip)
a project with a feature-flag surface documents the kill-switch toggle + flag-retirement ritual (conditional; N/A when no flag surface)
the agent sandbox is PROVEN to contain — boot + probe FS-scope/egress/caps, each negative paired with a positive control (.github/workflows/golden-path.yml containment-audit job)
